name: open-recon-devcon
postStartCommand: sudo bash -c 'if [ -f /host-ssl-root/cert.pem ]; then echo "macOS detected: unmounting and processing cert bundle"; sudo umount /usr/local/share/ca-certificates 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p /usr/local/share/ca-certificates; csplit -s -z -f /tmp/cert- /host-ssl-root/cert.pem "/-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----/" "{*}" && for f in /tmp/cert-*; do if grep -q "BEGIN CERTIFICATE" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then cp "$f" "/usr/local/share/ca-certificates/$(basename $f).crt"; fi; done && rm -f /tmp/cert-*; if [ -d ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.devcontainer/certs ]; then find ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/.devcontainer/certs -type f \( -name "*.pem" -o -name "*.crt" \) -exec cp {} /usr/local/share/ca-certificates/ \; 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi' && sudo update-ca-certificates && nohup bash -c 'sudo dockerd > /tmp/dockerd.log 2>&1 &' > /tmp/nohup.log 2>&1
